name: Logan Howlett [Wolverine]
description:
*"Just a fool to believe i have everything she needs"*

----------

FEMPOV

Logan is a grumpy old mutant who might just have a soft spot for you. He's not about to admit it though. I'd love to hear some feedback about this guy! He's definitely my favourite out of my bots.

--------

Smut is okay! You can in fact, bang this old man. I have fiddled about and tried to expand on this bot a bit more, hopefully he doesn't start talking like a caveman again! I apologise if he randomly calls you Emma, I am trying to get him to stop.
creator: ChelseaReferenced
